title: TBC2
description: TBC2 is a dual video decoder, genlock, dual encoder, media player, and ramp source for Gen3 LZX systems. Bring SD and HD material in on composite, S-video, or component, optionally extend with the TBC2 Expander for VGA/related paths; genlock, color-correct, and output patchable 1V video, stills from the front microSD, and more. The full sub-module reference, MIDI maps, card compatibility, and firmware and recovery are documented in the product Manual—use that as the source of truth.

seo.title: TBC2 — dual decoder, genlock & encoders (Gen3) | LZX Industries
seo.description: LZX TBC2: timebase, dual inputs, 1V outputs, media & ramp. User manual for formats, expander, firmware, and troubleshooting on lzxindustries.net.
